commit.message:
magetasks: Set GOTOOLCHAIN=auto when installing Golang dependencies (#40)

build: Set GOTOOLCHAIN=auto when installing dependencies

Set the `GOTOOLCHAIN` environment variable to "auto" when running `go install` for dependencies.

This leverages the Go 1.21+ feature to automatically download and use the Go toolchain version specified in the dependency's `go.mod` file. This improves build reproducibility and simplifies environment setup by removing the need to have a specific Go version pre-installed.

commit.message:
:gift: Buoy will float to branch for submodules other then root (#37)

* Avoid to float to tags for non-root submodules within repo

issues.title: Buoy support for nested submodules without named tags
issues.body:
### Important note

In a nutshell any potential improvement can't break existing repositories and update workflows due to unnecessary maintenance burden to fix  other repos because of 1 requirement. 



### Per comment on the 1.17 release issue

The current floating and updating of knative deps doesn't work well with `client` and `client/pkg` (sort of submodule that doesn't have submodule tag create on the client repo). There's the following error whenever resolving to `knative.dev/client` package only. This error may hinder bumps for other dependencies (to further investigated).



```
  go: module knative.dev/client@v0.44.0 found, but does not contain package knative.dev/client/pkg

```

https://github.com/knative-extensions/knobots/actions/runs/12987687379/job/36217114020#step:6:399

In this example there's resolution for both `client` and `client/pkg`, but ideally we should limit the path crawling to the latter only and skip `knative.dev/client` completely.
```
Floating deps to knative.dev/client-pkg@release-1.17 knative.dev/client/pkg@v0.44.0 knative.dev/eventing-kafka-broker@v0.44.0 knative.dev/hack@release-1.17 knative.dev/pkg@release-1.17

```


A few example of different flag combinations. Ideally for the case of `knative.dev/client/pkg` we would only need to resolve to release branch. That's offered in `--ruleset Branch`. However, the default flag combination and workflows for other repos would not benefit from it. 

The other discussed option is to alter `buoy` resolution for packages nested deeper than repository root level. That sounds ideal for `client/pkg` use case.

```
➜  kn-plugin-event git:(main) buoy float ./go.mod -d knative.dev/client --release 1.17 --module-release 0.44 --ruleset Branch
knative.dev/client/pkg@release-1.17
➜  kn-plugin-event git:(main) buoy float ./go.mod -d knative.dev/client --release 1.17
knative.dev/client/pkg@release-1.17
➜  kn-plugin-event git:(main) buoy float ./go.mod -d knative.dev/client --release 1.17 --module-release 0.44
knative.dev/client/pkg@v0.44.0
```

pullRequests.title: magetasks: Set GOTOOLCHAIN=auto when installing Golang dependencies
pullRequests.body:
**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Related: https://github.com/knative/hack/pull/436 **What this PR does, why we need it**:
Set the `GOTOOLCHAIN` environment variable to "auto" when running `go install` for dependencies. This leverages the Go 1.21+ feature to automatically download and use the Go toolchain version specified in the dependency's `go.mod` file. This improves build reproducibility and simplifies environment setup by removing the need to have a specific Go version pre-installed. This PR should prevent failures like [this](https://prow.ci.openshift.org/view/gs/test-platform-results/pr-logs/pull/openshift-knative_kn-plugin-event/920/pull-ci-openshift-knative-kn-plugin-event-release-1.17-419-unit/1978043424107925504#1:build-log.txt%3A52). /kind bug

pullRequests.title: Import schema-gen from knative/hack
pullRequests.body:
**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Part of https://github.com/knative/hack/pull/416 **What this PR does, why we need it**:
This PR just imports the schema tool from [knative/hack](https://github.com/knative/hack/tree/9c9eed6f6679d33ae7db78d0cfc6f03f7c2aee83/schema) to ease the PR review for the following PRs. I plan to fix https://github.com/knative/hack/pull/416, by incorporating changes from https://github.com/knative/hack/pull/417 and including the [modscope current code](https://github.com/knative/toolbox/blob/main/modscope/cli/current.go).
